backend/main.mo: Motoko actor for the Coal & Curry backend that handles table reservations, newsletter subscriptions, and customer reviews, with storage using Map and Set from the core library and blob storage via a mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three AI dish image generation and integration features to their associated files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries for all frontend source files, covering pages, components, data files, and public assets in the Coal & Curry React app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet that defines CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes, including colors, radius, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA that sets the page title to 'Coal & Curry' and mounts the app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/public/robots.txt: Robots.txt that allows all crawlers on all paths except /cart and /checkout, and references the sitemap URL.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: XML sitemap listing all 9 public pages of coalandcurry.com with canonical URLs, last-modified dates, change frequencies, and priority values.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with 11 routes, wraps the app in LanguageProvider and CartProvider, and renders the shared Layout with Navbar, Footer, FloatingReserveButton, and ChatbotWidget.
frontend/src/components/chatbot/ChatbotP: Chat UI panel component for the Agni chatbot that manages message state, simulates bot typing delay, renders conversation bubbles, and provides quick-reply shortcuts.
frontend/src/components/chatbot/ChatbotW: Floating toggle button component that shows or hides the ChatbotPanel, fixed to the bottom-right corner with a fire emoji icon.
frontend/src/components/gallery/Lightbox: A fullscreen image lightbox modal component with keyboard navigation (Escape, arrow keys) and prev/next buttons, displaying the current image with caption and position indicator.
frontend/src/components/home/CustomerRev: A carousel-style customer reviews section that fetches top reviews from the backend (falling back to hardcoded reviews) and displays three at a time with star ratings and navigation controls.
frontend/src/components/home/HeroSection: The full-screen hero section with a background charcoal grill image, overlays, tagline, headline, and CTA buttons linking to the menu, reservation, and checkout pages.
frontend/src/components/home/InstagramFe: Displays a 6-image Instagram feed grid using static asset images, each linking to the restaurant's Instagram profile with a hover overlay effect.
frontend/src/components/home/OffersGalle: A promotional section with a background image showcasing three hardcoded limited-time offers (Lunch Combo, Family Feast, Weekend Grill Fest) and a link to the full offers page.
frontend/src/components/home/SignatureDi: Displays a grid of four hardcoded signature dishes with images, badges, descriptions, prices, and add-to-cart buttons, plus a link to the full menu.
frontend/src/components/layout/FloatingR: A fixed floating action button in the bottom-right corner that links to the reservation page with a pulsing gold style.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: The site-wide footer with brand info, social links, quick navigation links, menu category links, and contact details, plus an embedded newsletter signup component.
frontend/src/components/layout/Navbar.ts: Responsive navigation bar with scroll-aware styling, mobile hamburger menu, cart item count badge, language toggle, and links to all main routes.
frontend/src/components/layout/Newslette: Newsletter subscription form that calls a backend mutation and displays success, duplicate, or error feedback states.
frontend/src/components/menu/DishCard.ts: Card component displaying a dish's image, name, description, spice level, price, veg/non-veg badge, and an add-to-cart button.
frontend/src/components/menu/MenuTabs.ts: Horizontally scrollable tab bar for filtering menu items by category, with emoji icons and active highlight styling.
frontend/src/components/offers/Countdown: Live countdown timer that updates every second and displays days, hours, minutes, and seconds remaining until a target date.
frontend/src/components/seo/SEOHead.tsx: Imperatively manages document head metadata including title, description, Open Graph, Twitter Card tags, canonical link, and JSON-LD structured data via useEffect.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: React context providing cart state (add, remove, update quantity, clear) with localStorage persistence and computed totals.
frontend/src/context/LanguageContext.tsx: React context for English/Tamil language switching, exposing a translation lookup function keyed against a static translations map.
frontend/src/data/menuData.ts: Defines the `Dish` interface, a list of menu categories, and a full `menuData` array containing all dishes for a Chettinad restaurant, including names, descriptions, prices, spice levels, and image URLs.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing Internet Identity authentication via `AuthClient`, exposing login, logout, and identity state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching reviews, submitting reviews, managing reservations, and subscribing to a newsletter by calling the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind CSS, and defines custom CSS variables and utility classes for the restaurant's coal/gold/maroon design theme.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider`.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page component displaying the restaurant's story, chef profiles, and hygiene certifications with a hero section and SEO metadata.
frontend/src/pages/Blog.tsx: Renders the Coal & Curry blog page displaying six static blog posts about Chettinad cuisine, coal-fire cooking, and Tamil culture, each with category color badges and SEO metadata.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Shopping cart page that lists cart items with quantity controls and removal options, shows a subtotal summary, and redirects to an empty-state view when the cart has no items.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Checkout page allowing users to select delivery or takeaway, enter a delivery address, choose a payment method, and confirm their order, with a post-confirmation success screen.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page displaying restaurant address, phone, email, business hours, social links, a WhatsApp shortcut, and a simple contact form with a submission confirmation state.
frontend/src/pages/Gallery.tsx: Gallery page organized into four themed sections (charcoal cooking, interiors, food photography, celebrations) with a lightbox component supporting previous/next navigation.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page that composes the hero, signature dishes, reviews, offers, and Instagram feed sections, and injects Restaurant schema.org structured data along with SEO metadata.
frontend/src/pages/Loyalty.tsx: Renders the Loyalty Program page showing tier levels (Coal to Inferno), program benefits, and a phone enrollment form with validation and success state.
frontend/src/pages/Menu.tsx: Renders the Menu page with category tabs filtering 50+ dishes from menuData, displaying results in a responsive grid of DishCard components.
frontend/src/pages/Offers.tsx: Renders the Offers page displaying six hardcoded time-limited deals (with dynamic expiry dates) in a grid, each with a CountdownTimer and discount badge.
frontend/src/pages/Reservation.tsx: Renders a table reservation form with validation, submits via useSubmitReservation hook, and shows a confirmation summary screen on success.
frontend/src/utils/chatbotResponses.ts: Defines a keyword-to-response map for the chatbot, covering topics like menu, hours, reservations, delivery, offers, pricing, and loyalty program.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom brand colors (coal, maroon, gold, smoky, cream), display fonts, fire/gold box shadows, and custom keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Tracks project state for a food/restaurant app, including requirements to generate AI images for 12 dishes and update image references in menuData.ts and SignatureDishes.tsx.
